mapper.select: SELECT LAWYER_ID, NAME, NAME_EN, BAR_NUMBER, EMAIL, PHONE, SPECIALTY, EDUCATION, CAREER, INTRODUCTION, STATUS, ADMISSION_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TB_LAWYER WHERE LAWYER_ID = #{lawyerId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT ID FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
INSERT INTO TB_LAWYER ( LAWYER_ID, NAME, NAME_EN, BAR_NUMBER, EMAIL, PHONE, SPECIALTY, EDUCATION, CAREER, INTRODUCTION, STATUS, ADMISSION_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{lawyerId}, #{name}, #{nameEn}, #{barNumber}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{specialty}, #{education}, #{career}, #{introduction}, #{status}, #{admissionDate}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update:
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'INACTIVE' ELSE 'ACTIVE' END FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND LAWYER_STATUS = 'APPROVED'
UPDATE TB_LAWYER SET NAME = #{name}, NAME_EN = #{nameEn}, EMAIL = #{email}, PHONE = #{phone}, SPECIALTY = #{specialty}, EDUCATION = #{education}, CAREER = #{career}, INTRODUCTION = #{introduction}, STATUS = #{status}, ADMISSION_DATE = #{admissionDate}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE LAWYER_ID = #{lawyerId}
UPDATE TB_LAWYER SET STATUS = 'INACTIVE', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE LAWYER_ID = #{lawyerId}
